name: github_download_repo_archive_tarball
description: Get a temporary download URL for a repository source archive as tar.gz (GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/tarball/{ref}). GitHub returns HTTP 302 with a Location URL; this tool returns that URL without downloading the archive. Use a branch, tag, or commit SHA for ref. For private repositories, these links expire after a few minutes.

ref.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA to archive (required path segment for the tarball endpoint).
